results.name: charm
results.description: Modal spells where you pick one option out of three

results.name: chawan
results.description: A bowl used for preparing tea.

results.name: cheaper than mv
results.description: The actual cost you pay for an effect (or for an alternate mode) will often be lower than the card's mana value.

results.name: cheat death
results.description: Return a creature or permanent to the battlefield or to your hand at the moment it dies.

results.name: cheat death-self
results.description: Cards that return themselves to the battlefield or to your hand at the moment they die.

results.name: cherub
results.description: Angels with child-like characteristics

results.name: chest
results.description: As in the container. For the anatomy, consider [bare chest](bare-chest).

results.name: chibi
results.description: A typically Anime art style that depicts characters with tiny bodies and large heads, usually for the purposes of looking childlike and cute.

results.name: chinese character
results.description: Chinese characters are logograms developed for the writing of Chinese. They have been adapted to write a number of other Asian languages, such as kanji in the Japanese writing system.

results.name: chin village
results.description: That village in the Earth Kingdom that REALLY hates Avatar Kyoshi.

results.name: chit sang
results.description: A Fire Nation prisoner at the Boiling Rock.

results.name: cho-arrim
results.description: A group of rebels, the most notable member being Cho-Manno.

results.name: chocobo
results.description: Kweh!

results.name: chocolina
results.description: Sazh's chocobo, known for residing in his hair.

results.name: chokehold
results.description: An arm around someone's neck.

results.name: chong
results.description: A wandering musician best known for his hit single, "Secret Tunnel"

results.name: chordatan
results.description: Fish people from an unknown plane who thrive on aether. Currently mainly found on [Avishkar](avishkar).

results.name: chromatic dragon
results.description: A type of dragon from Dungeons and Dragons, usually evil-aligned

results.name: chrome host
results.description: Blue-aligned Phyrexians led by Jin Gitaxias

results.name: cid
results.description: A name shared by multiple characters, across almost every mainline final fantasy game.

results.name: cinder (elemental)
results.description: Elementals of Shadowmoor, and the darker echoes of the Flamekin.
